response.overview: After stealing from his crime boss and framing his closest friend, Michael awakens chained in a dingy basement with no memory of how he got there. As his past unfolds, one of his betrayals finally catches up with him.
response.tagline: After stealing from his crime boss and framing his closet friend, an ambitious hustler is captured by a masked assailant and forced to confront the betrayals that sealed his fate.
response.title: Bound by Betrayal
